title: Taxi Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja | Fixed €680 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja. Fixed €680 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.

schema.name: Taxi Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja, 680 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1360 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Novalja from Dubrovnik Airport, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja is around 428 km and takes roughly 5 h 55 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Dubrovnik Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the arrivals hall, just after baggage reclaim, holding a sign with your name. I help with the luggage and walk you to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No problem. I track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup to the actual landing, with no extra charge for the wait.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from the private aviation terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I meet arrivals at both the commercial terminal and the private and general-aviation terminal used for private jets and charters. Just tell me your terminal or FBO when you book.

mainEntity.name: How much is the transfer from Dubrovnik Airport to Novalja?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 680 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, tolls and luggage included. A return trip is 1360.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can plan around your flight. For a same-day pickup after a sudden change, call or WhatsApp me and I will help if I can.
